title: Fix: Can you find the cheapest iPhone 16 pro
goal: Command 'Can you find the cheapest iPhone 16 pro available online rn and tell me if its worth buying' failed with: The task failed because the shopping_helper tool was not provided with the required text/query parameter despite the command clearly specifying the product to search for.. Suggestion: Extract the product query ('iPhone 16 Pro') from the command and pass it as the text parameter to shopping_helper, then use ai_process to evaluate the result.

test_requirements.case: route and execute 'Can you find the cheapest iPho...'

test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
test_focus_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
